name: tidy-review-efficiency
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit | scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,deterministic-output | lens: goldratt-toc | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: REVIEW_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: How to choose the files to review.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Explicit path boundary when REVIEW_SCOPE is path-set, or a narrowing filter over a diff.

required_inputs.name: FOCUS_HINTS
required_inputs.description: Optional efficiency concerns to prioritize, such as memory pressure or startup latency.
